$description: Source: Breakpoint values use Tailwind v3 default responsive breakpoints (https://tailwindcss.com/docs/responsive-design) — no Figma file key was available to read from Figma MCP at time of authoring (2026-03-22). Per D-15 these should come from the Figma Grids page; update with actual values once Figma file key is available. Breakpoints output as TypeScript constants ONLY (not CSS) per D-17. Per D-01 traceability requirement.
